steps.title: Find the slope from the table
steps.content: Using the points $(-6,65)$ and $(6,29)$, the slope is $\frac{29-65}{6-(-6)}=\frac{-36}{12}=-3$.

steps.title: Find the equation
steps.content: Use $y=-3x+b$ and the point $(6,29)$: $29=-3(6)+b$, so $b=47$. The line is $y=-3x+47$.

steps.title: Convert to the choice form
steps.content: Rewrite as $3x+y=47$, then multiply by $3$ to get $9x+3y=141$. That matches choice A.
